---
title: "LRP189: GP knee-test — taught-expressive vocabulary (TE) -> word reading (WR)"

format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    theme: cosmo
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-links:
      - repo
---

{{< include _partials/_header.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_setup.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_gate_badge.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_key_findings.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_reading_guide.qmd >}}

## Overview

LRP189 is a **GP knee-test**: a nonparametric (**HSGP**) re-attempt of the LRP89 mechanism, built
to test whether the taught-expressive-vocabulary -> word-reading association has a **"knee"** the
way [LRP58](../lrp-rli-mech-058) found for letter sounds.

LRP89 was forced to a **linear** mechanism on the vocabulary-exposure precedent (LRP56/57), so its
estimand is a single slope, not a shape. This variant switches the HSGP curve **back on** and lifts
`target_accept` to **0.999** (per LRP58).

_Non-convergence is itself the result._ A persisting divergence at `target_accept` 0.999 is the honest result and leaves the knee
untestable for this exposure — check the gate badge above before reading any shape into the curve.

## Adjustment set

Revised DAG (2026-07-10), re-derived by a backdoor d-separation search with the latent general
ability ($GA$) held: $TE$'s observed confounders that also reach word reading are
$\{A, HS, IG, IS, RW, SP, TR\}$; group $G\,(= IG)$ is the always-in precision term and
$W_{\text{pre}}$ the autoregressive baseline.

_Sessions added relative to LRP89._ This set **adds intervention sessions** ($IS$ = `attend`) relative to LRP89, which omitted it:
$IS \to TE$ and $IS \to WR$ make sessions a genuine confounder of $TE \to W$.

_Adjusted association, not causal._ Residual confounding by latent general ability ($GA$) remains, so $f^{TE}$ is an **adjusted
association**, not a causal effect. The randomised causal claim lives in the ITT suite.

![Model diagram](model_graph.png){#fig-model .lightbox fig-align="left"}

{{< include _partials/_priors.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_prior_predictive.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_results_mechanism.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_technical.qmd >}}
{{< include _partials/_footer.qmd >}}
